name: Sweet Revenge (Woman's Day 12/92)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour and spice ingredients.
2. Cream the margarine until softened at room temperature with an electric mixer.
3. Add brown sugar to the margarine mixture and beat until combined.
4. Add yogurt, egg whites, and white sugar to the mixture. Beat until smooth.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredient mixture to the wet ingredients. Mix well.
6. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 2 hours.
7. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
8. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper or silicone mats, spacing dough balls about 1 inch apart.
9. Roll each ball of dough into a small sphere.
10. Roll the spheres in granulated sugar until evenly coated.
11. Place the sugared dough balls on the prepared cookie sheets.
12. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until set and lightly golden.
13. Allow cookies to cool on a wire rack before storing them airtight for up to 3 weeks.
14. Each cookie contains approximately 80 calories, with 1.75 grams of fat and 13 grams of carbohydrates.
